featureName: Assignation de personnes aux interventions du bail
description: Ajouter la possibilite d'assigner des gestionnaires, prestataires et locataires a chaque intervention dans l'etape Interventions du wizard de bail. Bouton + par ligne, Popover avec checkboxes, locataires pre-selectionnes au premier clic.

userStories.title: Enrichir le modele de donnees avec assignedUsers
userStories.description: As a developer, I want ScheduledInterventionData to include an assignedUsers array so the UI can track who is assigned to each intervention
acceptanceCriteria: InterventionAssignment type defined (userId, role, name)
ScheduledInterventionData has assignedUsers: InterventionAssignment[]
contract-form-container initializes assignedUsers: [] for each intervention
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Types added in intervention-schedule-row.tsx, container initializes assignedUsers: []

userStories.title: Ajouter le bouton + et Popover d'assignation dans InterventionScheduleRow
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want a '+' button on each intervention row that opens a popover where I can assign team members so I can plan who will handle each task
acceptanceCriteria: Button with Users icon appears on each enabled intervention row
Clicking opens a Popover with 3 sections: Gestionnaires, Prestataires, Locataires
Each person shown with Checkbox + name + role badge
First click auto-selects lease tenants (if not already assigned)
Assigned users shown as avatar initials inline on the row
Button shows count badge when users are assigned
Hidden when intervention is disabled
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Popover with 3 type buttons (manager/tenant/provider), avatars with tooltips, count badge. Uses shared ContactSelector via ref.

userStories.title: Propager les assignations dans LeaseInterventionsStep et container
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the assignment changes to flow from the row through the step to the container state so assignments are tracked for submission
acceptanceCriteria: LeaseInterventionsStep receives availableContacts and leasetenantIds props
LeaseInterventionsStep passes onAssignmentChange to each row
contract-form-container computes available contacts grouped by role
container passes contacts + tenant IDs to LeaseInterventionsStep
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Step uses ContactSelector hideUI+ref, auto-assigns tenants on first type click, container passes teamId/leaseTenantIds/availableContacts

userStories.title: Creer les assignments cote serveur a la soumission
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want the people I assigned to be created as intervention_assignments when the lease is submitted so they appear on the intervention detail page
acceptanceCriteria: createInterventionAction accepts optional assignments param
Server action inserts into intervention_assignments after creating intervention
handleSubmit passes assignedUsers for each intervention
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Batch insert with service role client, non-blocking error handling
